Cloak

                            
Encrypted Credential Storage

                        

                        

                            The password manager that can't betray you.
                        

                    

                


                

                    

                    

                        
                        
Your passwords, cards, and secrets. Encrypted before they leave your device. Only your passkey can unlock them.

CLOAK

                    
Shared Credential

                

                

                    
Retrieving Shared Credential...

                

                
End-to-end encrypted · Shared via Cloak

            

        

    







    

        

        

        

        

        

            
Share Credential

            

                

                    
                    

                


                

                    
                    

                        
                        
                        
                        
                    

                


                

                
The share key is embedded in the URL fragment and never sent to the server. Only someone with the full link can decrypt the credential.


                

                    

                    
Self-destruct active: this link can only be viewed once.

                

            


            

                
                
                
            

        

    







    

        
        

        

        

        


        

            
            

                CLOAK
                SYS.CLOAK / PRIVACY
            


            
            

                
                
VAULT LOCKED

            


            
            

                PRESS P OR CLICK TO UNLOCK
                STATUS: LOCKED
            

        

    







    

        

            SCAN QR CODE
            
        

        

            
            
            

                

            

        

        
Point your camera at the QR code

    







    
DERIVING ENCRYPTION KEY...













    

        

            

                Import Credentials
                
            

            

                
Import from 1Password, Bitwarden, LastPass, Chrome, Firefox, or Apple Keychain. Export your passwords as CSV from your current password manager, then upload the file here.

                
■ Your CSV is processed entirely in your browser. Nothing is sent unencrypted.
